MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.title: Forge Guard
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [blue]1[/blue] times the [gold]Forge[/gold] amount.
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times the [gold]Forge[/gold] amount.
